---
title: "NanoMeme Compendium"
subtitle: "How we built a meme generator with Nano Banana 2"
---

## Welcome

NanoMeme is a meme generator experiment using Google's **Nano Banana 2** model (`gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview`, released February 26, 2026). It produces two deliverables:

1. **macOS Swift menu bar app** --- a hyper-composable SPM monorepo
2. **React Native + Expo smartphone app** --- iOS + Android with NativeWind

Both apps call the Gemini REST API directly, render text overlays in-app, and share the KaosMaps brand design language.

::: {.callout-note}
## Acceptance Criteria
A high-fidelity image of a Yoda-like character with the text **"Make or make not. There is no buy"** --- generated, rendered, and displayed in both apps.
:::

## Architecture at a Glance

```{mermaid}
graph TB
    subgraph "Shared"
        B[Brand Tokens]
        P[Yoda Prompt]
    end

    subgraph "macOS App"
        MC[NanoCore] --> MI[NanoImageKit]
        MD[NanoDesignKit] --> MU[PopoverView]
        MI --> MG[ImageGenerator]
        MS[NanoStorageKit] --> MU
        MG --> MU
    end

    subgraph "Mobile App"
        GC[geminiClient.ts] --> MS2[memeService.ts]
        ZS[Zustand Stores] --> SC[Screens]
        MS2 --> SC
    end

    B --> MD
    B --> SC
    P --> MG
    P --> MS2
```

## Project Stats

| Metric | macOS | Mobile |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Language | Swift 6 | TypeScript |
| Framework | SPM / AppKit / SwiftUI | Expo 55 / RN 0.83 |
| Files | 52 | 26 |
| Lines of code | ~5,000 | ~1,100 |
| Tests | 14 | 49 |
| API client | URLSession (Sendable) | fetch API |
| Key storage | Keychain Services | expo-secure-store |
| UI toolkit | NSPanel + SwiftUI | Expo Router + NativeWind |
| State | @Observable | Zustand |

## Navigation

Use the **sidebar** to explore each platform's implementation in detail, or jump directly:

- [macOS Architecture](macos/architecture.qmd) --- SPM monorepo design
- [Mobile Architecture](mobile/architecture.qmd) --- Expo Router + NativeWind
- [KaosMaps Brand + Interactive Palette](shared/brand-design.qmd) --- color system with live tweaking
- [Gemini API Reference](shared/gemini-api.qmd) --- request/response format

## Repository

<https://github.com/jankowtf/nano-meme>
